title: TraitWeight
description: A weighted contribution from a Choice to a single trait dimension. The aggregation of all TraitWeights for a playthrough is the Trait Vector.

dimension.description: Identifier of the trait dimension this weight contributes to. Big Five dimensions use the OCEAN prefix; Schwartz values use SCH-; attachment proxies use ATT-.

delta.description: Signed contribution in [-1.0, 1.0]. Aggregated linearly across all choices in a playthrough.

rationale.description: Author's note on why this choice contributes this weight to this dimension. Not exposed to players. Used for audit and replay.
